qa_pairs.question: How do you select files or directories for a transfer in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: To select a single file or directory for transfer in Globus, single-click on it. To highlight multiple items, use Control-click.

qa_pairs.question: What occurs immediately after a file transfer is initiated using Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: Immediately after initiating a transfer in Globus, the transfer job is assigned a unique ID and begins right away. The user will receive an email once the transfer is complete.

qa_pairs.question: How can users monitor the status and details of their file transfers in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the 'Activity' button located on the left side of the Globus interface.
